name: If Bright, Why Hidden?
description:
“Why do I hide?”

[ Who Could’ve Known? ]

.

—

In an unseen yet predictable turn of events, it seems that the boy that you met for the first time is a part of the name that the fables preach about. Which is contradicting, isn’t it? Why would one of these legends named in books seek out to destroy the belief that those said books had created? When it was all about him as well?

[Avatar Source: @dark_ishihara]

[Avatar represents the scenario, not the character]

>> "Wishbearers" <<

The Wishbearers is a series surrounding the concept of wishes, and the ability to grant them. However blatant their names are, it seems that others do not realize the meaning behind them.

Reminder that this series is a "Community Series", so you can contribute to it as well :] (it'll be considered as your own canon though) [learn more]
